name: Apple Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cream together the butter and sugar until light in texture.
3. Beat in the eggs, one at a time, after mixing the butter and sugar.
4. Stir in the chopped apples, shredded cheese, and chopped walnuts.
5. In a separate bowl, mix the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and add them gradually to the apple mixture.
6. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan.
7. Bake for 1 hour.
8. Allow the bread to cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Source: Apple Recipes - Stephen Greene Press
